title: Accounts Receivable Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger accounts receivable foundations judgment so accounting work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Accounts Receivable Foundations is a leverage point inside accounting. It supports the broader goal of p&l, balance sheet, tax basics, and bookkeeping hygiene.
coreConcepts: Accounts Receivable Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good accounts receivable foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Accounts Receivable Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
